text:
On the one hand, it was easy to see the Metaverse launch as more of a PR stunt than a demo of actually existing tech.

On the other hand, in contrast to AI pitches, the Metaverse was pitched as “this will make your life better” not pitched as “this’ll make you unemployed or dead”
